questions.question: Describe the Cloud Computing model as described in Chapter 1.1. What are its main characteristics, and how does it differ from the Service Oriented Architecture (SOA) model?
questions.hint: Describe the key aspects of the Cloud Computing model, its main characteristics, and its differences with SOA

questions.question: Explain the concept of Scalable Computing as mentioned in Chapter 1.2. Provide an example of a scalable computing model and its advantages.
questions.hint: Define scalable computing, provide an example of a scalable computing model, and explain its key advantages

questions.question: What is the relationship between Scalable Computing and Grid Computing as described in Chapter 1.3? Provide an example of how Grid Computing can be used to enable Scalable Computing.
questions.hint: Describe the relationship between Scalable Computing and Grid Computing, provide an example of how Grid Computing can be used to enable Scalable Computing
